title: colymbada oliveriana
intro: Colymbada oliveriana, also known as Pyrenean saw-wort, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Colymbada oliveriana can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
